stop.description: Tear down the agent's isolated dev environment on stop.

tools.name: dev_up
tools.description: Start the repo's isolated dev environment (DB + API server + Vite frontend on free ports).

params.name: cwd
params.description: Working directory override (e.g. a worktree path).

params.name: live
params.description: Enable live agent runtime (tmux) instead of inert mode.

tools.name: dev_restart
tools.description: Restart the repo's dev environment, picking up code changes (reuses ports and DB).

params.name: cwd
params.description: Working directory override (e.g. a worktree path).

params.name: live
params.description: Enable live agent runtime (tmux) instead of inert mode.

tools.name: dev_down
tools.description: Stop a dev environment and remove its database container. Without a suffix, stops the current agent's dev environment.

params.name: suffix
params.description: Target a specific dev environment by its suffix (e.g. agt_abc123def456).

tools.name: dev_status
tools.description: Show which dev services are running and their ports.

tools.name: dev_logs
tools.description: Show recent API server logs from the dev environment.

tools.name: list_dev_containers
tools.description: List all running dispatch-dev Postgres containers. Returns one container name per line.

tools.name: list_dispatch_sessions
tools.description: List tmux sessions belonging to this Dispatch server. Returns one session name per line. Uses DISPATCH_SESSION_PREFIX to filter (defaults to 'dispatch').

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all agents from the local Dispatch server with their IDs and statuses.

tools.name: list_candidate_databases
tools.description: List all dispatch_* databases on local Postgres (port 5432). Returns one database name per line.
command: PGPASSWORD=dispatch psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -U dispatch -d postgres -t -A -c "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname LIKE 'dispatch_%'" 2>/dev/null || true
